summary: import routes issues through the issueCreate mutation and returns a clear error for other resources, instead of the generated REST POST that a GraphQL-only API always rejects.
reason: Linear is GraphQL-only with no REST create endpoint, so the generated import (POST /<resource> per JSONL record) 400s on every record ('GraphQL operations must contain a non-empty query'). A regen must keep import going through a create mutation for issues, never a REST POST.
validated_outcome: import issues --input x.jsonl creates issues via issueCreate and records them in pp_created (verified live, then pp-cleanup archived them); import <other> returns an actionable error naming the typed create command; --dry-run sends nothing.
